1110301.name: Morale Boost
1110301.desc: Next turn, apply 2 [Agility] to self and allies who are adjacent to this unit on the Dashboard this turn.

1110321.name: Valor
1110321.desc: 1 ally with the most HP randomly gains 1 [Enhancement], 1 Defense Power Up, or 1 [Protection] at the start of the combat phase.
